# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

- image: gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest
    variables:
        # Add pipeline information for Gitlab-Runner
        GITLAB_URL: https://<your-url>/
        # Enable build notifications
        GCM_BUILD_NOTIFICATIONS_ON_MERGEREQUEST: "true"
        GCM_BUILD_NOTIFICATIONS_MERGE_REQUESTS_ON_SUCCESSFUL_CI_RUN: "true"
    environment:
        GITLAB_API_URL: ${GITLAB_URL}/api/v4
        # Add gitlab token to be used for deploy, create it by visiting the settings page of your project, select 'Tokens' and create a personal access token.
        GITLAB_TOKEN: <your-token>
